1.title: Our First Date
1.caption: Flowers on the table, fries in the middle — aur tum right across from me. Even in that moment, I just knew something khaas had started. Everything was perfect that day — even the fries.

2.title: That Smile
2.caption: Honestly, yeh is my favourite photo of us. Your head on mine, that little smirk you always have, and me smiling like an absolute idiot. Yahi toh looks like happiness to me — nothing more, nothing less.

3.title: I Surprised Her
3.caption: The sunflowers, the book — and woh expression on your face when you saw it all. Eyes shut, smiling so wide you couldn't even open them. Arre, I'd do it a hundred times over just to see this again.

4.title: At the Temple
4.caption: Standing in front of something ancient and beautiful — aur phir bhi, I kept looking at you. Bahut saari things in this world are sacred. You, without a doubt, are one of them.

5.title: Sneaky
5.caption: I was trying to take the photo, you were thoda pretending to stop me — and then this happened. Nobody planned it, aur shayad that's exactly why it feels so real. You're the best kind of unplanned.

6.title: Mirror Laughing
6.caption: We literally stopped for just a second and somehow ended up with the most unfiltered photo of us. Woh laugh of yours — completely real, completely you. Main this moment kabhi forget nahi kar sakta.

7.title: Elevator Selfie
7.caption: Bouquet still in hand, the two of us in a mirror, and the lift going up woh slowly — like even the building knew this wasn't a moment to rush. Kash it would've just kept going forever.

8.title: Station Goofballs
8.caption: Standing at the railway station being absolute idiots — aur yeh photo is all the proof anyone would ever need. I don't remember what we were laughing about, bas I remember not wanting to get on that train.

9.title: Us in Motion
9.caption: Kuch moments just refuse to stay still in a photo. This one moves — thoda like we do. Always forward, always together, always ours.

10.title: Eye to Eye
10.caption: Two pairs of eyes, one frame. Teri aankhein have this whole world inside them — and every single time I look, I get completely lost. Never gets old. Bas never.

11.title: Lazy Afternoon
11.caption: No plans, no rush — bas the two of us on a quiet afternoon with nowhere to be. Curtains drawn, world outside. Yeh wale moments are the ones I hold onto the most.

12.title: Kiss on the Cheek
12.caption: You leaned in without any warning and kissed my cheek like it was the most natural thing in the world — aur honestly, with you, it kind of is. Thoda the most natural thing, actually.

13.title: This Close
13.caption: The closer we got, the more I realised — tere baad, I don't think I could ever feel at home anywhere else. These eyes, this face. Always these. Always you.

14.title: Both at Once
14.caption: We both leaned in at the exact same time and it turned into more of a cheek squish than anything else. Aur yaar, honestly — this might be my favourite one of all. We always think alike.

15.title: Hold Me
15.caption: You buried your head in my shoulder beech sadak mein and I just held on. Didn't want to let go then. Aaj bhi nahi chahta. Still don't, and I don't think I ever will.

16.title: City Nights
16.caption: You spinning on that rooftop, hair flying, city lights all behind you — aur main just standing there thinking, yaar, she is something else. The whole skyline and still you're all I see.

17.title: Just Us Two
17.caption: We were just standing there, looking at each other — aur kisi ne quietly captured this. So glad they did. This is what we look like when there's no performance, no pose — bilkul real, bilkul us.

18.title: Golden Hour
18.caption: The sun was setting, you were pulling the most dramatic pout, aur main half out of the frame as usual. Still the most beautiful thing I've ever seen — and I mean you, not the sunset. Obviously.

19.title: Lean on Me
19.caption: Your head on my chest, eyes closed — aur main just looking down at you thinking, kya yeh sach mein ho raha hai? Even now, some days it still doesn't feel real that you're mine.

20.title: Infinity
20.caption: An infinity ring, the sea, a sunset behind it all. Main zyada kuch bola nahi tha that day at the water's edge — but everything I meant was in that one small, quiet moment. The ring says the rest.

21.title: One More Thing...
21.caption: You think this was all?...... I've been saving the best part for last. Close your eyes, take a breath — there's one more surprise waiting for you.
